functions.name: Hostnames
functions.doc: returns normalized hostnames that look like runtime or API endpoints

functions.name: ServiceNames
functions.doc: returns normalized lower-case service-like names useful as cross-repository references

telemetry: none; calling projector emits metrics for reference write path
key_invariants: Both functions are line-scoped and key-gated before regex runs - reduces noise
Hostnames: false-positive blocklist covers file extensions, code-shaped TLDs, CamelCase segments, JS prototype keywords
ServiceNames: candidates require 3+ hyphen-separated parts, length 5-100; content-type, max-old-space-size, pull-requests always rejected
Output sorted and deduplicated for stable Postgres upserts
No file I/O, no Postgres, no graph - pure pattern extraction over already-indexed content

hostname_filters.line_key_patterns: host, hostname, url, origin, endpoint, ingress, server_name, base_url etc
hostname_filters.blocked_tlds: jpg, json, yaml, ts, js, html, log, md, endpoint, host, hostname, etc
hostname_filters.blocked_segments: exports, module, internals, require, prototype, constructor, this

service_name_filters.line_keywords: app:, argocd, helm, image:, ingress, service, terraform, etc
